summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of AYESHA'S PRIVATE UNIVERSE Phase 1 vertical slice. All 20 backend pytest cases pass (gateway 6 variants, wrong-answer, cookie/session, /auth/me, progress lifecycle, hidden-scroll gating, final-viewed gating, story position persistence, memories list/detail/favourite, rate limit 429). Frontend end-to-end: Boot → Gateway → Home dashboard (all 10 bento cards, progress ring, rotating line, greeting) → Our Story (all 16 sections present) → Why I Love You (hero + orbit chapter with 'meku bhook lagri' copy) → Memories (8 cards, search 'kiss' filters to Oct 11, our_firsts filter returns 4) → MemoryDetail sep-17 with hidden bow → 3.5s long-press unlocks hidden-scroll after visiting 4 section routes → /ten-months accessible with month-light-1..10 and ten-months-continue, and persists after reload. Mobile dock at 390x844 renders with mobile-dock + mobile-nav-home/memories/why-i-love-you/more, and 'more' sheet exposes Our Song, Ayesha, Ameen, Wreck Room, Safe Space, Calendar, Games, Settings. bento-final flips to 'UNLOCKED / The tenth month is waiting' after unlock.

ui_bugs.issue: Spec requested data-testid='mobile-nav-story', but actual testid is 'mobile-nav-our-story' (derived from NAV_ITEMS id 'our-story' in /app/frontend/src/lib/config.js). Functionally correct; only the naming diverges from spec. Either rename the primary nav id to 'story' with a separate path, or update the spec/testid. Suggest adding an alias data-testid or renaming to match spec.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Reconcile MobileDock testid naming — spec expected 'mobile-nav-story' but code emits 'mobile-nav-our-story'. Purely a naming issue, all navigation works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 750-line file; consider splitting into routers (auth, progress, memories) as it grows past Phase 1.
Rate-limit is in-memory (defaultdict) — will reset on every backend restart and won't work across replicas. Fine for a single-instance private app but worth noting.
Session lookup requires exact cookie token match against DB (good), but sessions grow unbounded — no TTL/cleanup index on private_sessions.expires_at.
profile_id is hardcoded to 'ayesha' — single-user model is intentional per PRD, so acceptable.
All API responses correctly exclude Mongo _id via memory_to_public serializer and doc.pop('_id') in /progress.
test_credentials: Gateway answer '17 September 2025' (or any of 6 accepted formats). No username.
seed_data_creation: None — used the 8 memories seeded automatically by backend on startup. Tests clean the 'progress' collection between test cases for the shared 'ayesha' profile.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend rate limit is 12 wrong attempts per 15 min per IP (in-memory). Rate-limit test lives in class TestZRateLimit (runs last) and exhausts the counter — restart backend before re-running the full suite: `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`. pytest.ini forces xdist -n 2 --dist loadscope; use `-n 0` to run serially since all sessions share profile_id='ayesha' and progress state. clean_progress fixture wipes db.progress for 'ayesha' between test cases.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only cosmetic naming mismatch on one mobile testid.
